programme.title: A Gentleman
programme.desc: Gaurav, a young man living in Miami, USA, wishes to settle down and marry his girlfriend. However, his plans are put on hold when he travels to Mumbai and is mistaken for a spy.

programme.title: Grand Masti
programme.desc: Friends Amar, Meet and Prem, who are unhappy with their married lives, decide to go for their college reunion to have fun. However, they get in trouble with the principal and a student.

programme.title: Copy
programme.desc: Sid always tries to fulfil what society expects of him to avoid the stigma of being an outcast. However, he is conflicted between choosing what others expect out of him and what he wants to be.

programme.title: Saptagiri Express
programme.desc: A happy-go-lucky actor is forced to do his father's job after his unexpected demise. However, when he realises his father was murdered, he sets out to exact vengeance.

programme.title: Aksar
programme.desc: Rajveer cannot divorce his possessive wife Sheena due to an expensive pre-nuptial agreement. However, when he hires Ricky to seduce and get rid of her, his plan backfires.

programme.title: Darna Mana Hai
programme.desc: Six friends relate spooky tales to one another while stranded on a highway. Each story turns out to be scarier than the next one but the biggest horror strikes when some of the friends go missing.

programme.title: Taarzan: The Wonder Car
programme.desc: Raj revamps his deceased father's car into a wonderful car named Taarzan and the car comes alive as it is possessed by his father's spirit. Soon, it also starts killing his father's murderers.

programme.title: Salaar Part 1: Ceasefire
programme.desc: Just when the prince of Khansaar is about to rise to the throne, a plan of overthrowing him is exercised and only one man can help him retrieve power.

programme.title: Action Jackson
programme.desc: After falling love with a clumsy girl, a small-time goon comes in contact with his doppelganger, AJ, before setting off on a romantic journey with his ladylove.

programme.title: Shiddat
programme.desc: After falling madly in love, a man tries to convey his feelings. However, the object of his affections is betrothed to another and asks him to prove his love.

programme.title: Bhagavanth Kesari
programme.desc: A former prisoner is adamant about training his adoptive daughter to join the Indian Army. However, his mission is interrupted by a conflict with a ruthless businessman.
